mdSummary:
# Barcode

Inline SVG Code 128B barcode renderer (scannable).

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/barcode

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Barcode | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| Barcode | Format | `BarcodeFormat` | `BarcodeFormat.Code128` |  |
| Barcode | Height | `int` | `80` |  |
| Barcode | BarWidth | `double` | `2` |  |
| Barcode | ShowText | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Barcode | Color | `string` | `"foreground"` |  |
| Barcode | BackgroundColor | `string` | `"background"` |  |
| Barcode | OnError | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Fired after (re)encoding with the human-readable error message, or null when the value encoded successfully — a validation hook so a consumer can surface its own UI / gate a submit. (#291) |
| Barcode | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Barcode | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `OnError` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Fired after (re)encoding with the human-readable error message, or null when the value encoded successfully — a validation hook so a consumer can surface its own UI / gate a submit. (#291)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Barcode />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Barcode/Barcode.razor`
